title: Player Heartbeat
description: Adds heartbeats when there are players nearby!
body:
# 💓 Player Heartbeat: Feel the Pressure

Turn your Minecraft server into a high-stakes thriller. **Player Heartbeat** adds an immersive, frenetic proximity system that alerts you when other players are nearby.

Perfect for **PvP servers, UHC, Battle Royales**, or just adding a layer of paranoia to your SMP.

## 👁️ How it works
Forget about x-ray or boring nametags. Trust your senses.
When a player enters your radius, a heart icon appears on your screen (above the hotbar). As they get closer, the heart beats faster and changes color, accompanied by an intensifying heartbeat sound.

## 📡 The Radar System
The detection radius is calibrated for balanced PvP encounters:

* 💛 **Yellow (Warning):** 46 - 70 blocks. *Someone is lurking in the distance.*
* 🧡 **Orange (Danger):** 21 - 45 blocks. *They are getting closer.*
* ❤️ **Red (CRITICAL):** 0 - 20 blocks. **PREPARE TO FIGHT!**

## ⚙️ Smart Features
* **🎚️ Integrated Volume Control:** Is the heartbeat too intense? You don't need to lower your master volume. We've added a **custom "Heartbeat" slider** directly inside Minecraft's **Music & Sounds** options menu. Adjust it to your liking!
* **Fair Play Logic:** The system only works for players in **Survival** or **Adventure** mode.
* **Anti-Cheat/Admin Friendly:** Players in **Creative** or **Spectator** modes are completely invisible to the radar. They won't trigger the heartbeat, and they won't see the heartbeat interface.
* **Admin Controls:** Need to pause the chaos? Use commands to toggle the system globally.
    * `/heartbeat enable` - Activates the system.
    * `/heartbeat disable` - Deactivates it instantly for everyone (Useful for lobbies or pre-game grace periods).

## 🎥 Demonstration
*(Note: In this demo, a Creeper is used as a reference for the detection system, but in-game it works specifically for players).*

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FyNT1QLDDWM" title="Player Heartbeat Demo" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_It may seem a lot of blocks, but trust me, it's perfectly balanced for players!_

If you have any suggestions or bug reports, please, send me a discord message (gali04)!

*Ready to heighten your senses? Download Player Heartbeat today!*
